ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key or name of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enum to indicate the current status of the building (e.g., 'planning', 'construction', 'completed', 'terminated') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_configurations" (
  "building_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building configuration setting */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the configuration setting belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key or name of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the building configuration setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the building configuration setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_configurations_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_configurations" (
  "user_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user configuration setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the configuration setting belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key or name of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user configuration setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user configuration setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting that was changed */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the configuration setting belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key or name of the configuration setting */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration setting */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration setting */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
